Records.description: Amoeba family, amoeba_L3_massless-internal-offshell-external. Nonplanar Calabi-Yau bestiary graph at odd loop order L, with 2(L+1) MASSLESS propagators (arXiv:1810.07689). X-cell ladder body with open corners at BOTH ends (no apexes); degree-keyed decoration: 4 off-shell corner legs, no massless legs; 4 effective legs at every L (figure-pinned; L=3 = K_{2,4}, Fig. 2e). Marginal in D=4; L=3 has non-maximal rigidity, maximal 2(L-1) from L=5.
